app.name: CIMon
app.privacyHint: Runs entirely on your machine. No cloud, no telemetry. Your token stays in the OS keychain.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose which pipeline events trigger a native notification.
settings.detailDesc: Notify at the pipeline level, the job level, or both.
settings.pollIntervalHint: How often to check for changes.
settings.launchAtLoginError: Could not change the launch-at-login setting.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.desc: Connect a GitLab account with a read-only token. The token is stored in your OS keychain, never on disk.
accounts.empty: No accounts yet. Add one to start monitoring.
accounts.label: Label
accounts.tokenHint: Personal access token with the read_api scope.

error.unauthorized: Token rejected. Check the token and its scope.
error.invalid_base_url: Invalid instance URL. It must start with https.

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: Pick the projects you want CIMon to watch.
projects.noAccounts: Add an account first to choose projects.
projects.none: No projects found for this account.
